name: Sauteed Garlic Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes and cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet large enough to hold the potatoes in one layer.
3. Add garlic and saute until just golden, about 1 minute.
4. Add potatoes and saute until golden all sides and tender, about 15 minutes, tossing occasionally.
5. Sprinkle with salt and cover. Reduce heat and cook gently for another 10 minutes or until fully soft.
6. Remove the garlic and season with a little more salt and pepper to taste.
